title: Milestone Camping 65580 2L Whistling Camping Kettle/Durable and Lightweight/Pouring Spout and Heat-Resistant Handle/Stainless Steel/Ideal for Camping, Fishing, Workshops and Garages
features: 2L WHISTLING KETTLE – This 2L stainless steel kettle is perfect to take on all camping trips and adventures. With its whistling function and single base, this stove kettle is ideal for camping, fishing, boats, workshops, and garages.
DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT – The kettle is constructed with aluminium which makes it very durable and lightweight while travelling. The kettle measures at H 22 x W 21 x Dia. 18cm.
POURING SPOUT AND HANDLE – The folding Bakelite handle is heat resistant so you can use it safely and comfortably, without the worry of burning yourself.
EVEN HEAT DISTRIBUTION - Heat distributes evenly throughout the whole kettle, so you can enjoy hot drinks with friends and family or use for washing up while camping.
MILESTONE CAMPING – Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. Visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description Whistles When Ready Compact Camping Kettles Enjoy hot drinks while out and about using these portable camping kettles. With a 2 Litre capacity, the kettles are capable of making several cups' worth of hot water, and can easily cover the needs for a group of campers. Measuring just 22cm high by 18cm diameter, the kettles are easy to transport, especially with their folding handles saving even more space. Previous page Durable & Lightweight Made from stainless steel, the kettles are sturdy and suitable for travel without weighing you down. Even Heat Distribution The kettles' circular design and flat single base ensures heat is distributed evenly during boiling. Convenient Handle & Lid The kettles' heat resistant handle folds over, saving space and making the lid easily accessible. Easy, Safe Pouring The handle shape makes pouring easy, and the spout cover design removes the risk of steam burns. Whistling Spout Once the water has finished boiling, the kettle will whistle to let you know it's ready. Next page 1 Durable & Lightweight 2 Even Heat Distribution 3 Convenient Handle & Lid 4 Easy, Safe Pouring 5 Whistling Spout
